game_info.title: Star of Providence: Sector Zero
game_info.concept:
Star of Providence is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated elements. Explore a large, abandoned facility in search of incredible power, fighting dangerous foes and gaining new weapons and upgrades as you progress. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/603960/Star_of_Providence/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Star of Providence is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated elements. Explore a large, abandoned facility in search of incredible power, fighting dangerous foes and gaining new weapons and upgrades as you progress. Descending in the darkness of a long-abandoned facility, a lone ship searches for wealth, power and the scattered pieces of the past.
______________________________________________________________________________

Star of Providence is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated elements. Explore a progression of floors as you make your way into the depths of the facility, encountering increasingly deadly enemies, fantastic weapons, upgrades, choices and revelations as you venture deeper towards a great and calamitous power.

Features:
  • Smooth, gracious, fast action gameplay, tailored to feel good to play.
  • 13 different types of weapons with over 50 unique modifiers and a ludicrous number of combinations.
  • A number of floors with their own layouts, traps and enemies.
  • Intricate and energetic chiptune soundtrack to complement the beat of the action.

The game now comes with the previously paid DLC, Relics of the Past, for free!

  • New enemies! New hazards! New bosses! Over 2000 new room layouts!
  • Two new floors! The elusive Temple and the overflowing b0unds o. -$556/-err
  • Looping! Every game loop beaten unlocks a yet harder one.
  • Over 40 unique weapons! Rare, powerful and different spins on the default armaments.
  • Cartridges! Utilize the power of over 40 ancient, bootleg storage devices.
  • Blessings! The council lends their strength. Choose wisely.
  • Practice mode! Test your mettle, practice any boss you've faced.
  • New playable characters! Yes.
  • Hacking! Finally.

May Power Eternal grant you everlasting life.
game_info.description: Star of Providence: Sector Zero is a fast-paced top-down action shooter set in a procedurally generated derelict facility. Pilot your scout ship through dangerous sectors, battling automated defense systems and alien infestations. Clear each room of hostiles to unlock the blast doors and descend deeper. Collect power modules to upgrade your weaponry. Your goal is to survive 5 increasingly difficult sectors and defeat the Sector Guardian to secure the Providence Core.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move your ship.
- Z: Fire weapon.
- Space: Dash (evasive maneuver with temporary invulnerability).
- Shift: Focus Mode (Slow movement, lock facing direction for precision strafing).
- Enter: Start Game.
- Esc: Pause / Unpause.
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screens).

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement, shooting mechanics, and game stability over a short duration.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will simulate random movement inputs (Arrow keys) and periodic firing (Z key) and dashing (Space) to ensure the player entity responds correctly and no runtime errors occur during basic gameplay actions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for 500 frames without crashing. The player's position changes, projectiles are spawned, and the game state remains in "PLAYING" (or transitions naturally if the player dies, though survival is likely in early stages).

TEST_2.test_description: Verify the win condition by simulating a high-powered run through all sectors.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Enable a "God Mode" in the test logic (high damage, invincibility). The controller will aggressively move towards the nearest enemy and fire. Upon clearing a room, it will move to the exit zone to progress to the next sector until the final boss is defeated.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game progresses through all 5 sectors. The `gameState.gamePhase` transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" after defeating the final boss.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify collision detection and player damage logic.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will stand still and allow enemies to attack. It will not fire or dash.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player's health decreases upon collision with enemies or projectiles. The game eventually transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" when health reaches zero.
